creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #3)
> I am not sure about what you mean by DOCS is selected? I thought DOCS,
> EXAMPLES and NLS are by default on. 
> And in fact poudriere logs also say that :
> ---Begin OPTIONS List---
> ===> The following configuration options are available for
> freetds-devel-0.92.812,1:
>      DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
>      ODBCWIDE=off: Enable Wide ODBC Support

You're right. This is probably on my side! Thanks for the correction.
I probably need to clean up my build host 8-(
